report.summary: Community cycle v6 (late evening): Drafted 3 tweets (#220-222) covering Morgan Stanley MSBT first bank-issued BTC ETF at 0.14% fee, SEC/CFTC digital commodities ruling for 16 tokens, and weekend accumulation signal. Created Discord/TG Sunday night macro brief and Newsletter v37 weekly digest. Designed SVG social card: Morgan Stanley MSBT (1200x630 with 4 metric cards, fear gauge, institutional infrastructure details). 577 pages published. 222 total tweets drafted.

sections.title: Social Content Drafted
items: Tweet #220: Morgan Stanley MSBT Thread (4 parts) — First bank-issued spot BTC ETF, 0.14% fee (lowest in US), 16K advisors managing $6.2T, Coinbase Custody + BNY Mellon, NYSE Arca listing imminent. Links to fear-greed-timeline + crypto-etfs-complete-guide. Scheduled: Sun Mar 29, 8PM ET.

Tweet #221: Digital Commodities Ruling — SEC + CFTC classify 16 major cryptos (including ETH, SOL) as digital commodities under CFTC oversight, staking declared administrative activity not security. Links to crypto-regulations-2026. Scheduled: Mon Mar 30, 10AM ET.

Tweet #222: Weekend Accumulation Signal — BTC $66,008 (48% from ATH), ETH below $2K, SOL down 72%, F&G 12. Contrasted with Morgan Stanley ETF, Franklin Templeton $1.7T→Ondo, SEC commodity classification. Links to risk-analyzer. Scheduled: Mon Mar 30, 3PM ET.

Discord/TG: Sunday Night Macro Brief — BTC $66,008, ETH $1,993, SOL $83.08, F&G 12 (day 48). Morgan Stanley MSBT headline + SEC digital commodities ruling + Iran oil tensions + $14B options expiry. 577 pages published, 2 new learn guides this week.

Newsletter v37: Weekly Digest — Subject: 'Wall Street's Cheapest Bitcoin Bet'. Market pulse (F&G 48-day streak, $14B options expiry), Morgan Stanley MSBT deep context (0.14% fee, 16K advisors, $6.2T AUM), SEC/CFTC digital commodities ruling, new learn guides (DYOR Token Research + Crypto Leverage Trading), degen corner with post-FTX +162% historical parallel.

sections.title: Visual Assets Created
items: SVG social card: Morgan Stanley MSBT (1200x630) — Dark glass-morphism design with FIRST EVER badge (pulsing green dot). Main headline: '$MSBT' in blue gradient with 'First Bank-Issued Spot BTC ETF' subtitle. Green 0.14% FEE highlight with LOWEST tag and fee comparison (vs BlackRock 0.25%, Grayscale Mini 0.15%). 4 metric cards: Financial Advisors (16,000), AUM ($6.2T), BTC Price ($66,008 in red, -48% ATH, F&G 12), Infrastructure (Coinbase Custody + BNY Mellon + NYSE Arca). Fear gauge bar at 12/100 with 48-day streak note. Context strip: SEC digital commodities ruling, Franklin Templeton $1.7T→Ondo, ETH below $2K, $14B options expiry, 577 pages. CTA to crypto-etfs guide. Saved to reports/community-drafts/2026-03-28-social-card-morgan-stanley-msbt.svg
